---
title: "Evelyn Mary St. John Mildmay"
---

## Evelyn Mary St. John Mildmay

**Dates:** (d. 1881)

### Description

daughter of the Ven. Carew Mildmay

### Biography

Fourth daughter of the Ven. Carew St. John Mildmay, she married in 1878 the Rev. William Quennell, Rector of Shenfield.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 28th 1877 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
